title: How To Make Your Design System AI-Ready
description: A practical guide for preparing design systems to work effectively with AI-generated prototypes, covering strategies to reduce design drift, maintain context, and improve output quality. Essential reading for design leaders adapting their systems for an AI-augmented workflow.

title: Designing how designers master AI
description: An exploration of how designers can develop personalized mastery with AI tools by bending them to their existing workflows rather than adopting rigid approaches. This essay reframes AI adoption as a continuous, divergent learning process unique to each designer, offering perspective on sustainable tool integration.

title: The speed of prototyping in the age of AI
description: A firsthand account of how AI has fundamentally changed the prototyping, planning, and shipping process while emphasizing the importance of maintaining hands-on design practice. Offers practical insights on balancing speed gains with meaningful design involvement.

title: Building for voice In, visuals out
description: An insightful analysis of voice-first interfaces that generate visual outputs, exploring both the potential brilliance and technical challenges—particularly latency—that designers must navigate. Critical perspective on an emerging interaction paradigm.

title: Voice is the New UI
description: A comprehensive examination of how voice interaction is reshaping the future of user interfaces beyond traditional graphical paradigms that have dominated since the 1990s. Explores implications for designers rethinking interaction models.

title: Ultimate Claude Code Setup for Product Designers
description: A practical setup guide for product designers leveraging Claude Code, addressing the reality that most designers don't need deep coding knowledge to unlock AI-assisted development. Demystifies technical tools for design practitioners.

title: heerich.js
description: A lightweight, zero-dependency JavaScript engine for rendering 3D voxel scenes to SVG with boolean operations and flexible camera perspectives. A valuable tool for designers and developers seeking performant 3D visualization capabilities.

title: Transitions.dev
description: A curated collection of production-ready transitions for web applications available for immediate copy-paste integration into any project. Eliminates friction in implementing polished micro-interactions across web designs.
